message:
🐛 Fix Check Now to use git fetch instead of rate-limited GitHub API (#1593)

The "Check Now" button on the developer channel was unreliable because
kc-agent called the GitHub API without auth, hitting the 60 req/hour
rate limit. Replace with `git fetch origin main` + `git rev-parse
origin/main` for dev installs — instant, no rate limits, always accurate.

Also re-reads currentSHA from the repo on each status check so the UI
reflects local pulls without requiring a kc-agent restart.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
